title: SUBSCRIPTION CONTROL
subtitle: Manage VPN access, trial state, upgrade path, add-ons, billing signals, and provisioning readiness from one customer-safe cockpit.
choosePlanBelow: Choose a plan below to get started
noPlansAvailable: No plans available at the moment
rewardsHubDescription: Manage invite codes, referral sharing, and invite redemption from one place instead of splitting the flow across subscription screens.
checkoutCodesDescription: Promo codes belong in checkout. Invite redemption stays in the rewards hub so pricing and access do not diverge across surfaces.

addons.description: Add-ons are quoted against the current entitlement before purchase, so price and access deltas stay backend-authoritative.
addons.empty: No active add-ons are available for the current plan.

purchase.completed: Add-on was applied to the subscription.
purchase.pending: Add-on checkout created. Complete the invoice to activate it.

addons.purchaseError: Add-on purchase failed. Retry or contact support.
addons.quoteError: Add-on quote failed. Retry after refreshing the page.
addons.title: Extra capacity and access

current.description: This is the backend entitlement currently controlling VPN access, device limits, traffic policy, and service delivery.
current.noPlanDescription: Choose a public plan or activate an eligible trial to provision VPN access.

history.empty: No order history returned by the backend yet.
history.title: Recent subscription orders

nextActions.addonsAvailable: Optional add-ons can be quoted for this plan.
nextActions.choosePlan: Choose a plan or trial to unlock VPN access.
nextActions.finishProvisioning: Provisioning is still pending. Check service access before importing configs.
nextActions.noAddons: No add-ons are currently available for this plan.
nextActions.paymentSignal: At least one paid order should exist for long-term access.
nextActions.title: Next best actions

commit.pending: Plan change checkout created. Complete the invoice to activate it.

planActions.commitError: Plan change failed. Retry or use checkout support.
planActions.quoteError: Plan quote failed. Retry after refreshing the catalog.

plans.description: Public plans are loaded from the canonical web catalog. Current plan is locked; other plans are quoted before purchase or upgrade.
plans.empty: No public plans are available right now.
plans.title: Choose the next access tier

sync.description: Queries pause in hidden/offline tabs and can be refreshed manually.

trial.activeDescription: Trial access is active. {count} days remain before a paid plan is required.
trial.eligibleDescription: Start the trial to provision a limited VPN entitlement before checkout.
trial.error: Trial activation failed. Retry or contact support.
trial.success: Trial activated. Access state is refreshing.
